ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., 20MICRONS) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "listed_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed on the exchange */,
  "isin_code" TEXT /* ISIN code of the stock */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the stock (e.g., EQ, BE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the trade was executed on */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time the trade was executed */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, short) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who executed the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, broker, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NSE, BSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency traded on the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the broker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the broker */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency" TEXT /* Currency being converted from */,
  "to_currency" TEXT /* Currency being converted to */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, executed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trade record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded on the trade date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "stock_split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock paying the dividend */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payment (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isin_codes" (
  "isin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISIN record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the ISIN code belongs to */,
  "isin_code" TEXT /* ISIN code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isin_codes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the series belongs to */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series (e.g., EQ, BE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevcloses" (
  "prevclose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each previous close record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the previous close belongs to */,
  "prevclose_price" REAL /* Previous close price */,
  "prevclose_date" TEXT /* Date the previous close price was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prevclose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevcloses_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the balance belongs to */,
  "balance" REAL /* Account balance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the balance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
